chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1586 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6240/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For hearing of main case. 23-09-2025 Petitioner is present in person. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Petitioner present in person does not press instant petition and submits that he will file petition afresh after curing some defects in respect of some respondents and prayer clause, made in the petition. Order accordingly. This petition along with listed applications is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
